tool_args.label: Fordham Road Bus Priority

payload.description: Bus priority project on Fordham Road from Sedgwick Avenue to Bronx River Parkway, presented to Bronx Community Board 7. Converting existing curbside bus lanes to offset bus lanes and widened curbside bus lanes between Hoffman Ave and Sedgwick Ave.
payload.lead_agency: New York City Department of Transportation

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
